en: Did you know that Conan O'Brien has two children?
ko: 코난 오브라이언에게 두 자녀가 있다는 거 알아?

en: The first is his daughter Nev O'Brien, who was born in 2003
and is the first child of Conan and his wife Liza Powell O'Brien.
ko: 코난과 아내 리자 파월 오브라이언의 첫째야.

en: Nev seems to have inherited her father's intelligence.
ko: 네브는 아버지의 지능을 물려받은 것 같아.

en: She currently attends the prestigious Yale University
and works as an illustrator for the Yale Daily News.
ko: 예일 데일리 뉴스의 일러스트레이터로 일하고 있어.

en: Conan often mentions on his podcast that his daughter is extremely sharp
and can instantly see through the silly stories he makes up at the dinner table.
ko: 저녁 식탁에서 지어내는 우스운 이야기를 바로 꿰뚫어 본다고 자주 말해.

en: The second is his son Beckett O'Brien, who was born in 2005.
From a young age, he showed a very unique personality.
ko: 어릴 때부터 아주 독특한 성격을 보여줬어.

en: One of the most memorable stories Conan has shared on his show
ko: 코난이 방송에서 공유한 가장 기억에 남는 일화 중 하나는

en: is that during a school hero day, Beckett refused to dress as a superhero
ko: 학교 영웅의 날에 베켓이 슈퍼히어로 분장을 거부하고

en: and instead accurately recreated Steve Jobs,
ko: 대신 스티브 잡스를 정확하게 재현했다는 것인데,

en: which became a classic comedic anecdote on the program.
ko: 이건 프로그램의 클래식한 코미디 일화가 되었어.

en: Although Conan has hosted countless shows in the television industry,
ko: 코난이 TV 업계에서 수많은 프로그램을 진행했지만,

en: neither of his children has pursued a career in entertainment.
ko: 두 자녀 모두 연예 분야의 커리어를 추구하지 않았어.

en: He has always placed great importance on family life,
ko: 그는 항상 가정생활을 매우 중요하게 여겨왔고,

en: and off-camera he's more like a...
